MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF DREXEL UNIVERSITY'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Appearances: Vincent Morelli (no contact information) defendant can responding party;
Samy Henein of Suppa Trucchi & Henein, LLP (619.297.7330) for plaintiff and moving party

The claim of exemption is discussed and the court rules as follows: defendant to pay $200 per pay period towards the judgment. Order signed. Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/HEK)
